summary: Second CI Doctor MQ invocation for same run. CPU functional tests failed because the PR intentionally introduced test failures in matmul.cpp to observe the new run_parallel.py behavior that prints the first 10 failed tests in CI output.

root_cause.explanation: PR #36469 deliberately injects GTEST_FAIL() calls in src/plugins/intel_cpu/tests/functional/custom/single_layer_tests/classes/matmul.cpp at line 196 with message 'intentional failure to observe new run_parallel.py output'. This causes 645 MatMulLayerCPUTest tests to fail. The purpose is to validate that run_parallel.py now correctly prints the first 10 failed test logs directly in the GHA workflow output.
evidence: matmul.cpp(196): error: Failed - intentional failure to observe new run_parallel.py output
